retry_reason: kref_get is unconditional and always succeeds; there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This is a pure get-wrapper that acquires a reference on an acpi_ipmi_msg by incrementing its kref. The incremented reference is transferred to the caller via the return value. The caller takes ownership of this reference and must eventually release it with a matching kref_put (or equivalent) when the message is no longer needed. The function does not fail and returns the same pointer it received, ensuring the caller can chain the reference acquisition with other operations.
